name: document_id_not_null
expression: document_id IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(document_id)) > 0
description: Document/encounter ID is the EMR primary key for note attribution — without it the record cannot be linked to an encounter, clinician, or patient in downstream systems

name: avg_confidence_minimum
description: Overall extraction confidence below 0.60 indicates severe document quality issues (handwriting, fax artifacts, non-SOAP formatting) — route to clinical review queue rather than ingest

name: note_date_not_null
description: Note date is required for clinical timeline integrity, regulatory retention schedules, and quality measure date attribution; undated notes cannot be safely processed

name: provider_name_not_null
expression: provider_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(provider_name)) > 0
description: Provider name is required for attribution, peer review routing, credentialing verification, and medical-legal documentation; anonymous notes must be quarantined

name: note_type_valid_enum
description: Note type must be a recognized clinical note category for downstream care management and quality reporting routing; unrecognized types flag for reclassification

name: chief_complaint_present
expression: chief_complaint IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(chief_complaint)) > 0
description: Chief complaint is a core clinical documentation element; its absence may indicate extraction failure or a structurally incomplete note requiring clinical review

name: assessment_diagnoses_present
expression: assessment_diagnoses IS NOT NULL AND ARRAY_SIZE(assessment_diagnoses) > 0
description: At least one diagnosis must be present in the Assessment section for care coordination, billing code mapping, and quality measure attribution; absence flags documentation gap
